top_signals.title: Gold Edges Lower as Uncertainty Clouds Talks to End US-Iran War
top_signals.summary: Gold edged lower as renewed clashes in the Middle East cast doubt over negotiations between the US and Iran to end the war that’s upended energy flows and heightened inflation concerns.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Guinea’s Simandou Iron Exports Surge Six Months After First Ore
top_signals.summary: Exports from Guinea’s Simandou iron ore project surged in May, six months after the first shipment to China, marking a milestone in the ramp-up of the high-grade mine that has the potential to reshape the global market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
